text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating well. It starts with a balanced diet, which means including fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins in your meals while limiting sugar and processed foods. Regular exercise is also essential, as it strengthens your body and improves your mood. You should aim for at least 30 minutes of activity most days. Equally important is good sleep—most adults need seven to nine hours each night to recover and stay focused. Finally, do not forget your mental health. Finding a healthy work-life balance, such as taking breaks and spending time on hobbies, helps reduce stress. By combining these habits, you can feel healthier and happier every day.
